title: ezSAT assertion fail when using freduce
body:
##  Steps to reproduce the issue

I'm running Yosys https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/commit/9d658a19708b99288bed2d8c8da3a2fe987a21b3 on Fedora 32 on an x86_64 computer.

 * Load with `read_ilang` this file: [top.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4864320/top.zip) (generated with nMigen)
 * Run the freduce command

## Expected behavior

freduce reducing my design.

## Actual behavior

Yosys crashes:
```
Running functional reduction on module rx:
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch \uart_0__rx__i.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch \divisor.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch \ack.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch \clk.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch \rst.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch $42.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch $40.
  Finding reduced input cone for signal batch $36.
yosys: libs/ezsat/ezsat.cc:757: std::vector<int> ezSAT::vec_or(const std::vector<int>&, const std::vector<int>&): Assertion `vec1.size() == vec2.size()' failed.
```

GDB backtrace:
```
#0  0x00007ffff7865a25 in raise () from /lib64/libc.so.6
#1  0x00007ffff784e895 in abort () from /lib64/libc.so.6
#2  0x00007ffff784e769 in __assert_fail_base.cold () from /lib64/libc.so.6
#3  0x00007ffff785de86 in __assert_fail () from /lib64/libc.so.6
#4  0x00000000005afb87 in ezSAT::vec_or(std::vector<int, std::allocator<int> > const&, std::vector<int, std::allocator<int> > const&) ()
#5  0x000000000067a324 in Yosys::SatGen::importCell(Yosys::RTLIL::Cell*, int) ()
#6  0x000000000069a4a8 in (anonymous namespace)::FindReducedInputs::register_cone_worker(std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit>, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >&, std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit>, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >&, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#7  0x000000000069a589 in (anonymous namespace)::FindReducedInputs::register_cone_worker(std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit>, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >&, std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit>, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit> >&, Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit) ()
#8  0x000000000069c08e in (anonymous namespace)::FreduceWorker::run() ()
#9  0x000000000069ea92 in (anonymous namespace)::FreducePass::execute(std::vector<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::allocator<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > > >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) ()
#10 0x000000000052818a in Yosys::Pass::call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::vector<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::allocator<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > > >) ()
#11 0x0000000000528533 in Yosys::Pass::call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >) ()
#12 0x0000000000581e60 in Yosys::run_frontend(std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >*, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >*, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) ()
#13 0x000000000050b5e8 in main ()
```
